summary: All 6 criteria independently verified: pure static CostMeter with correct longest-prefix resolution, claude-code vendor-cost passthrough with no CostMeter coupling, correct compat-vs-openai cost-provider discrimination, additive Budget USD axis. 3731 tests green; only the 13 estimatedFiles touched; package.json/src/config/agentic loop untouched (all nonGoals satisfied).
